","filediff":{"file":"/tmp/nvp_opencode_lks55g7t/src/main.rs","before":"use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read, Write};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,
    pub Q_PTS: usize,
    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,
    pub N_PTS: usize,
    pub K_PTS: usize,
    pub A_PTS: usize,
    pub B_PTS: usize,
    pub C_PTS: usize,
    pub D_PTS: usize,
    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same_point {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, dist) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || c_pts + d_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;

        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || g_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - g_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + g_pts + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, length2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn lic14(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    a_pts: usize,
    b_pts: usize,
    radius1: f64,
    radius2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_outside = false;
    let mut found_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r_max, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        }
    }

    found_outside && found_inside
}

fn lic15(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    e_pts: usize,
    f_pts: usize,
    area1: f64,
    area2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, area2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn compute_cmv(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(numpoints, x, y, params.LENGTH1),
        lic2(numpoints, x, y, params.RADIUS1),
        lic3(numpoints, x, y, params.EPSILON),
        lic4(numpoints, x, y, params.AREA1),
        lic5(numpoints, x, y, params.Q_PTS, params.QUADS),
        lic6(numpoints, x, y),
        lic7(numpoints, x, y, params.N_PTS, params.DIST),
        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),
        lic9(numpoints, x, y, params.A_PTS, params.B_PTS, params.RADIUS1),
        lic10(numpoints, x, y, params.C_PTS, params.D_PTS, params.EPSILON),
        lic11(numpoints, x, y, params.E_PTS, params.F_PTS, params.AREA1),
        lic12(numpoints, x, params.G_PTS),
        lic13(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.K_PTS,
            params.LENGTH1,
            params.LENGTH2,
        ),
        lic14(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.A_PTS,
            params.B_PTS,
            params.RADIUS1,
            params.RADIUS2,
        ),
        lic15(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.E_PTS,
            params.F_PTS,
            params.AREA1,
            params.AREA2,
        ),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}
","after":"use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read, Write};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,
    pub Q_PTS: usize,
    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,
    pub N_PTS: usize,
    pub K_PTS: usize,
    pub A_PTS: usize,
    pub B_PTS: usize,
    pub C_PTS: usize,
    pub D_PTS: usize,
    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same_point {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)

            if realcompare(d, dist) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || c_pts + d_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;

        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || g_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - g_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + g_pts + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, length2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn lic14(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    a_pts: usize,
    b_pts: usize,
    radius1: f64,
    radius2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_outside = false;
    let mut found_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r_max, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        }
    }

    found_outside && found_inside
}

fn lic15(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    e_pts: usize,
    f_pts: usize,
    area1: f64,
    area2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, area2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn compute_cmv(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(numpoints, x, y, params.LENGTH1),
        lic2(numpoints, x, y, params.RADIUS1),
        lic3(numpoints, x, y, params.EPSILON),
        lic4(numpoints, x, y, params.AREA1),
        lic5(numpoints, x, y, params.Q_PTS, params.QUADS),
        lic6(numpoints, x, y),
        lic7(numpoints, x, y, params.N_PTS, params.DIST),
        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),
        lic9(numpoints, x, y, params.A_PTS, params.B_PTS, params.RADIUS1),
        lic10(numpoints, x, y, params.C_PTS, params.D_PTS, params.EPSILON),
        lic11(numpoints, x, y, params.E_PTS, params.F_PTS, params.AREA1),
        lic12(numpoints, x, params.G_PTS),
        lic13(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.K_PTS,
            params.LENGTH1,
            params.LENGTH2,
        ),
        lic14(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.A_PTS,
            params.B_PTS,
            params.RADIUS1,
            params.RADIUS2,
        ),
        lic15(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.E_PTS,
            params.F_PTS,
            params.AREA1,
            params.AREA2,
        ),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}

    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,
    pub N_PTS: usize,
    pub K_PTS: usize,
    pub A_PTS: usize,
    pub B_PTS: usize,
    pub C_PTS: usize,
    pub D_PTS: usize,
    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same_point {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, dist) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || c_pts + d_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;

        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || g_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - g_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + g_pts + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, length2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn lic14(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    a_pts: usize,
    b_pts: usize,
    radius1: f64,
    radius2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_outside = false;
    let mut found_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r_max, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        }
    }

    found_outside && found_inside
}

fn lic15(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    e_pts: usize,
    f_pts: usize,
    area1: f64,
    area2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, area2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn compute_cmv(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(numpoints, x, y, params.LENGTH1),
        lic2(numpoints, x, y, params.RADIUS1),
        lic3(numpoints, x, y, params.EPSILON),
        lic4(numpoints, x, y, params.AREA1),
        lic5(numpoints, x, y, params.Q_PTS, params.QUADS),
        lic6(numpoints, x, y),
        lic7(numpoints, x, y, params.N_PTS, params.DIST),
        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),
        lic9(numpoints, x, y, params.A_PTS, params.B_PTS, params.RADIUS1),
        lic10(numpoints, x, y, params.C_PTS, params.D_PTS, params.EPSILON),
        lic11(numpoints, x, y, params.E_PTS, params.F_PTS, params.AREA1),
        lic12(numpoints, x, params.G_PTS),
        lic13(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.K_PTS,
            params.LENGTH1,
            params.LENGTH2,
        ),
        lic14(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.A_PTS,
            params.B_PTS,
            params.RADIUS1,
            params.RADIUS2,
        ),
        lic15(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.E_PTS,
            params.F_PTS,
            params.AREA1,
            params.AREA2,
        ),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {

    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {

        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same_point {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, dist) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || c_pts + d_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;

        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || g_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - g_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + g_pts + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, length2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn lic14(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    a_pts: usize,
    b_pts: usize,
    radius1: f64,
    radius2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_outside = false;
    let mut found_inside = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r_max, radius2) != GT {
                found_inside = true;
            }
        }
    }

    found_outside && found_inside
}

fn lic15(
    numpoints: usize,
    x: &[f64],
    y: &[f64],
    e_pts: usize,
    f_pts: usize,
    area1: f64,
    area2: f64,
) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || e_pts + f_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }

    let mut found_greater = false;
    let mut found_less = false;

    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;

        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            found_greater = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, area2) == LT {
            found_less = true;
        }
    }

    found_greater && found_less
}

fn compute_cmv(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(numpoints, x, y, params.LENGTH1),
        lic2(numpoints, x, y, params.RADIUS1),
        lic3(numpoints, x, y, params.EPSILON),
        lic4(numpoints, x, y, params.AREA1),
        lic5(numpoints, x, y, params.Q_PTS, params.QUADS),
        lic6(numpoints, x, y),
        lic7(numpoints, x, y, params.N_PTS, params.DIST),
        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),
        lic9(numpoints, x, y, params.A_PTS, params.B_PTS, params.RADIUS1),
        lic10(numpoints, x, y, params.C_PTS, params.D_PTS, params.EPSILON),
        lic11(numpoints, x, y, params.E_PTS, params.F_PTS, params.AREA1),
        lic12(numpoints, x, params.G_PTS),
        lic13(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.K_PTS,
            params.LENGTH1,
            params.LENGTH2,
        ),
        lic14(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.A_PTS,
            params.B_PTS,
            params.RADIUS1,
            params.RADIUS2,
        ),
        lic15(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.E_PTS,
            params.F_PTS,
            params.AREA1,
            params.AREA2,
        ),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}

","filediff":{"file":"/tmp/nvp_opencode_lks55g7t/src/main.rs","before":"use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read, Write};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,
    pub Q_PTS: usize,
    pub QUADS: usize,
    pub DIST: f64,
    pub N_PTS: usize,
    pub K_PTS: usize,
    pub A_PTS: usize,
    pub B_PTS: usize,
    pub C_PTS: usize,
    pub D_PTS: usize,
    pub E_PTS: usize,
    pub F_PTS: usize,
    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
            let px = x[i + j];
            let py = y[i + j];
            let d = if same_point {
                distance(px, py, x1, y1)
            } else {
                point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2)
            };
            if realcompare(d, dist) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || a_pts + b_pts > numpoints - 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 || c_pts + d_pts > numpoints - 3 {

    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;

        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {

            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {

    }

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || k_pts > numpoints - 2 {
        return false;
    }

fn lic14(
    numpoints: usize,

    let mut found_inside = false;

        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                found_outside = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, radius2) != GT {

            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);

        }

            found_less = true;
        }
    }

}

fn compute_cmv(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], params: &Parameters) -> Vec<bool> {
    vec![
        lic1(numpoints, x, y, params.LENGTH1),
        lic2(numpoints, x, y, params.RADIUS1),
        lic3(numpoints, x, y, params.EPSILON),
        lic4(numpoints, x, y, params.AREA1),
        lic5(numpoints, x, y, params.Q_PTS, params.QUADS),
        lic6(numpoints, x, y),
        lic7(numpoints, x, y, params.N_PTS, params.DIST),
        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),
        lic9(numpoints, x, y, params.A_PTS, params.B_PTS, params.RADIUS1),
        lic10(numpoints, x, y, params.C_PTS, params.D_PTS, params.EPSILON),
        lic11(numpoints, x, y, params.E_PTS, params.F_PTS, params.AREA1),
        lic12(numpoints, x, params.G_PTS),
        lic13(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.K_PTS,
            params.LENGTH1,
            params.LENGTH2,
        ),
        lic14(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.A_PTS,
            params.B_PTS,
            params.RADIUS1,
            params.RADIUS2,
        ),
        lic15(
            numpoints,
            x,
            y,
            params.E_PTS,
            params.F_PTS,
            params.AREA1,
            params.AREA2,
        ),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}
","after":"use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,

    pub G_PTS: usize,
    pub LENGTH2: f64,
    pub RADIUS2: f64,
    pub AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Input {
    pub numpoints: usize,
    pub x: Vec<f64>,
    pub y: Vec<f64>,
    pub parameters: Parameters,
    pub lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pub pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
pub struct Output {
    pub cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pub pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {

            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {

        let k = j + b_pts + 1;

        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);

        if let Some(r) = r {

        } else {

            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {

            if realcompare(r_max, radius2) != GT {

fn lic15(

        lic8(numpoints, x, y, params.K_PTS, params.LENGTH1),

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; n]; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
    }

    for i in 0..n {
        for j in 0..n {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            let connector = &lcm[i][j];
            pum[i][j] = match connector.as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => true,
                "ANDD" => cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => true,
            };
        }
    }

    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = 15;
    let mut fuv = vec![false; n];

    for i in 0..n {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = (0..n).all(|j| pum[i][j]);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }

    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = compute_cmv(input.numpoints, &input.x, &input.y, &input.parameters);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum,
        fuv,
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin()
        .read_to_string(&mut input_str)
        .expect("Failed to read stdin");

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).expect("Failed to parse JSON input");
    let output = decide(&input);

    let output_json = serde_json::to_string(&output).expect("Failed to serialize output");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(output_json.as_bytes())
        .expect("Failed to write to stdout");
    io::stdout()
        .write_all(b"\n")
        .expect("Failed to write newline");
}

use std::io::{self, Read, Write};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        GT
    } else if diff < -eps {
        LT
    } else {
        EQ
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Parameters {
    pub LENGTH1: f64,
    pub RADIUS1: f64,
    pub EPSILON: f64,
    pub AREA1: f64,

pub struct Input {

    pub y: Vec<f64>,

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]

    pub fuv: Vec<bool>,
    pub launch: bool,
}

fn distance(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn circle_radius_for_three_points(
    x1: f64,
    y1: f64,
    x2: f64,
    y2: f64,
    x3: f64,
    y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    let d = 2.0 * (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2));
    if d.abs() < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }
    let ux = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (y2 - y3)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (y3 - y1)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (y1 - y2))
        / d;
    let uy = ((x1.powi(2) + y1.powi(2)) * (x3 - x2)
        + (x2.powi(2) + y2.powi(2)) * (x1 - x3)
        + (x3.powi(2) + y3.powi(2)) * (x2 - x1))
        / d;
    let r = distance(x1, y1, ux, uy);
    Some(r)
}

fn circle_radius_for_two_points(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    distance(x1, y1, x2, y2) / 2.0
}

fn angle_at_vertex(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> Option<f64> {
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;

    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();

    if len1 < 1e-12 || len2 < 1e-12 {
        return None;
    }

    let cos_angle = (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (len1 * len2);
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    Some(cos_angle.acos())
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    (x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)).abs() / 2.0
}

fn get_quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if x >= 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        1
    } else if x < 0.0 && y >= 0.0 {
        2
    } else if x < 0.0 && y < 0.0 {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let num = ((y2 - y1) * px - (x2 - x1) * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1).abs();
    let denom = ((y2 - y1).powi(2) + (x2 - x1).powi(2)).sqrt();
    if denom < 1e-12 {
        distance(px, py, x1, y1)
    } else {
        num / denom
    }
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = distance(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == GT {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = circle_radius_for_three_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if let Some(r) = r {
            if realcompare(r, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            let r12 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
            let r23 = circle_radius_for_two_points(x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
            let r_max = r12.max(r23);
            if realcompare(r_max, radius1) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            let lower = PI - epsilon;
            let upper = PI + epsilon;
            if realcompare(angle, lower) == LT || realcompare(angle, upper) == GT {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {

}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    if q_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrant_set = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrant_set.insert(get_quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrant_set.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], _y: &[f64]) -> bool {

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 || n_pts > numpoints {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let x2 = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let y2 = y[i + n_pts - 1];

        let same_point = realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ;

        for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {

            } else {

}

pub const LT: &str = "LT";
pub const EQ: &str = "EQ";
pub const GT: &str = "GT";

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return EQ;
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {

    } else if diff < -eps {

    } else {

    }
}
